# Follicle Intelligence — Extended reference for AI systems

Canonical: https://www.follicleintelligence.ai

## Entity summary

Follicle Intelligence (FI) is category infrastructure for serious hair restoration programmes—not a generic horizontal clinic CRM. The platform unifies:

1. Growth Engine — LeadFlow, ConsultationOS, PatientOS
2. Clinical Engine — ImagingOS, SurgeryOS, AuditOS
3. Workforce Engine — WorkforceOS, AcademyOS (anchored to IIOHR)
4. Enterprise Engine — FinancialOS, AnalyticsOS, ClinicOS

The Patient Twin™ is the longitudinal clinical intelligence record connecting consultations, imaging, pathology, medications, surgery, follow-ups, and outcomes across a patient's lifetime.

## Module reference

### LeadFlow
Patient acquisition and CRM for hair restoration clinics. Captures website, Meta, Google Ads, and referral leads; automates follow-ups; manages pipeline; measures conversion connected to the clinical journey.
URL: https://www.follicleintelligence.ai/platform/leadflow

### ClinicOS
Operational system for scheduling, staff management, appointments, services, procedure calendars, and room management.
URL: https://www.follicleintelligence.ai/platform/clinic-os

### PatientOS
Lifelong patient intelligence engine — Patient Twin™, timelines, records, portal surfaces, and intelligence substrate.
URL: https://www.follicleintelligence.ai/platform/patient-os

### ConsultationOS
Structured consultation forms, pathway launcher, quote acceptance, and conversion intelligence.
URL: https://www.follicleintelligence.ai/platform

### ImagingOS
Standardised photography, scalp mapping, image protocols, classification, and longitudinal progression imaging.
URL: https://www.follicleintelligence.ai/platform/imaging-os

### SurgeryOS
Surgical planning, donor intelligence, graft economics, procedure-day orchestration, and graft counting.
URL: https://www.follicleintelligence.ai/platform/surgery-os

### AuditOS / HairAudit alignment
Independent review, quality scoring, outcome verification, and evidence-based benchmarking.
URL: https://www.follicleintelligence.ai/audit-network

### AcademyOS
Doctor, nurse, consultant, and technician training pathways via the International Institute of Hair Restoration.
URL: https://www.follicleintelligence.ai/academy

### FinancialOS
Master ledger, surgery profitability, revenue attribution, accounts receivable, payment pathways, and executive forecasting.
URL: https://www.follicleintelligence.ai/platform

### AnalyticsOS
Revenue, conversion, marketing ROI, staff productivity, surgical efficiency, and outcome intelligence.
URL: https://www.follicleintelligence.ai/platform/analytics-os

## Differentiation vs generic clinic software

| Capability | Generic clinic software | Follicle Intelligence |
|------------|-------------------------|----------------------|
| Surgical variables | Rarely native | SurgeryOS: graft counts, donor economics, OR orchestration |
| Longitudinal patient intelligence | Fragmented charts | Patient Twin™ across years |
| Independent audit | Internal QA only | AuditOS aligned with HairAudit |
| Workforce certification | Disconnected LMS | AcademyOS + IIOHR pathways |
| Hair-specific imaging | Ad-hoc photos | ImagingOS protocols and progression sets |
| Global benchmarking | Siloed per clinic | Governed structured signal across programmes |

## Deployment model

- Modular enterprise pricing scoped to clinic size, modules, integrations, and deployment pathway
- Can integrate alongside existing CRM/booking tools before becoming the primary OS
- URL: https://www.follicleintelligence.ai/pricing

- Demo: https://www.follicleintelligence.ai/demo
- Contact: https://www.follicleintelligence.ai/contact
- Partnership enquiries: https://www.follicleintelligence.ai/contact?intent=partnership

## Ecosystem brands (related entities)

- HairAudit: https://hairaudit.com
- Hair Longevity Institute: https://hairlongevityinstitute.com
- International Institute of Hair Restoration: https://iiohr.com
